---
title: "Scenario Explorer"
---

## Production Audit Summary

Scenario-level statistics from the 72,872-run audit-uniform dataset.

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
pick_path <- function(paths) {
  for (p in paths) if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  ""
}

# --- March 2026 Production Audit ---
audit_stats_path <- pick_path(c(
  "../assets/transport/audit_2026-03-17/tables/comprehensive_scenario_stats.csv",
  "../../site/assets/transport/audit_2026-03-17/tables/comprehensive_scenario_stats.csv"
))
if (nzchar(audit_stats_path)) {
  astats <- utils::read.csv(audit_stats_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  total_runs <- format(sum(astats$n_runs), big.mark = ",")
  cat(sprintf("<h3>March 2026 Production Audit (%s runs)</h3>\n", total_runs))
  cat(sprintf("<p><strong>Data source:</strong> <code>%s</code></p>\n", audit_stats_path))

  # Build summary table
  astats$scenario <- paste(astats$powertrain, astats$product_type, astats$origin_network, sep = " / ")
  show_cols <- data.frame(
    Scenario = astats$scenario,
    Powertrain = astats$powertrain,
    `Product Type` = astats$product_type,
    `Origin Network` = astats$origin_network,
    Runs = format(astats$n_runs, big.mark = ","),
    `Mean CO2 (kg)` = round(astats$mean_co2_kg_total, 1),
    `Mean Distance (mi)` = round(astats$mean_distance_miles, 1),
    `Mean Trip (h)` = round(if ("mean_trip_duration_total_h" %in% names(astats)) astats$mean_trip_duration_total_h else astats$mean_trip_h, 1),
    `Mean Charge Stops` = round(astats$mean_charge_stops, 1),
    `Mean CO2/1000kcal` = formatC(astats$mean_co2_per_1000kcal, format = "f", digits = 4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE
  )

  cat("<table class='table table-striped' style='margin-top:12px;'>\n")
  cat("<thead><tr>")
  for (nm in names(show_cols)) cat(sprintf("<th>%s</th>", nm))
  cat("</tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n")
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(show_cols))) {
    cat("<tr>")
    for (nm in names(show_cols)) cat(sprintf("<td>%s</td>", show_cols[[nm]][i]))
    cat("</tr>\n")
  }
  cat("</tbody></table>\n")
}
```

## Per-Run Explorer

Filter and sort individual simulation runs by scenario, powertrain, and origin. Data from the baseline local chunked run (80 runs).

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
pick_path <- function(paths) {
  for (p in paths) if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  ""
}

fu_rows_path <- pick_path(c(
  "../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_rows.csv",
  "assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_rows.csv",
  "../assets/transport/distribution_davis_fu_final/data/transport_sim_rows.csv",
  "assets/transport/distribution_davis_fu_final/data/transport_sim_rows.csv",
  "../../site/assets/transport/distribution_davis_fu_final/data/transport_sim_rows.csv",
  "../../site/assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_rows.csv",
  "outputs/distribution/distribution_davis_fu_final/transport_sim_rows.csv"
  ,"outputs/distribution/local_chunked_run/transport_sim_rows.csv"
))

if (nzchar(fu_rows_path)) {
  df <- utils::read.csv(fu_rows_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    cat("<p><em>Latest FU transport rows file exists but is empty.</em></p>")
    knitr::knit_exit()
  }

  keep <- c(
    "replicate_id", "scenario_name", "powertrain", "origin_name", "destination_name", "reefer_on",
    "trip_distance_miles", "trip_duration_hours", "congestion_delay_hours", "diesel_gallons",
    "traction_electricity_kwh", "charging_events", "total_trip_co2_kg", "co2_per_1000kcal"
  )
  for (nm in keep) if (!(nm %in% names(df))) df[[nm]] <- NA
  df <- df[, keep, drop = FALSE]

  scenario_vals <- sort(unique(df$scenario_name))
  power_vals <- sort(unique(df$powertrain))
  origin_vals <- sort(unique(df$origin_name))

  scenario_options <- paste(sprintf("<option value='%s'>%s</option>", scenario_vals, scenario_vals), collapse = "")
  power_options <- paste(sprintf("<option value='%s'>%s</option>", power_vals, power_vals), collapse = "")
  origin_options <- paste(sprintf("<option value='%s'>%s</option>", origin_vals, origin_vals), collapse = "")

  row_html <- apply(df, 1, function(r) {
    sprintf(
      "<tr data-scenario='%s' data-power='%s' data-origin='%s'><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%.2f</td><td>%.2f</td><td>%.2f</td><td>%.2f</td><td>%.2f</td><td>%s</td><td>%.3f</td><td>%.6f</td></tr>",
      toupper(r[["scenario_name"]]), toupper(r[["powertrain"]]), toupper(r[["origin_name"]]),
      r[["replicate_id"]], r[["scenario_name"]], r[["powertrain"]], r[["origin_name"]], r[["destination_name"]],
      as.numeric(r[["trip_distance_miles"]]), as.numeric(r[["trip_duration_hours"]]), as.numeric(r[["congestion_delay_hours"]]),
      as.numeric(r[["diesel_gallons"]]), as.numeric(r[["traction_electricity_kwh"]]),
      as.character(r[["charging_events"]]), as.numeric(r[["total_trip_co2_kg"]]), as.numeric(r[["co2_per_1000kcal"]])
    )
  })

  cat(
    sprintf("<p><strong>Data source:</strong> <code>%s</code> &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Total rows:</strong> %s &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Date:</strong> 2026-03-17</p>", fu_rows_path, format(nrow(df), big.mark = ",")),
    "<div style='display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:8px'>",
    "<label for='scenario-filter'><b>Scenario:</b></label> ",
    "<select id='scenario-filter'><option value='ALL'>ALL</option>", scenario_options, "</select>",
    "<label for='power-filter'><b>Powertrain:</b></label> ",
    "<select id='power-filter'><option value='ALL'>ALL</option>", power_options, "</select>",
    "<label for='origin-filter'><b>Origin:</b></label> ",
    "<select id='origin-filter'><option value='ALL'>ALL</option>", origin_options, "</select>",
    "<button id='csv-download-btn' style='margin-left:auto; padding:6px 16px; background:#0d4f8f; color:white; border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:bold'>Download CSV</button>",
    "</div>",
    "<div id='filter-summary' style='background:#edf4fb; padding:10px 16px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px; font-size:0.95em'></div>",
    "<table id='scenario-table' class='table table-striped' style='margin-top:4px;'>",
    "<thead><tr><th>Rep</th><th>Scenario</th><th>Powertrain</th><th>Origin</th><th>Destination</th><th>Distance (mi)</th><th>Duration (h)</th><th>Congestion (h)</th><th>Diesel gal</th><th>BEV kWh</th><th>Charge stops</th><th>Total CO2 kg</th><th>CO2 / 1000 kcal</th></tr></thead>",
    "<tbody>", paste(row_html, collapse = "\n"), "</tbody></table>",
    "<script>",
    "const sSel=document.getElementById('scenario-filter');",
    "const pSel=document.getElementById('power-filter');",
    "const oSel=document.getElementById('origin-filter');",
    "const summaryDiv=document.getElementById('filter-summary');",
    "const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('#scenario-table tbody tr')];",
    "const hdr=['Rep','Scenario','Powertrain','Origin','Destination','Distance (mi)','Duration (h)','Congestion (h)','Diesel gal','BEV kWh','Charge stops','Total CO2 kg','CO2 / 1000 kcal'];",
    "function applyFilters(){",
    " const s=sSel.value.toUpperCase(), p=pSel.value.toUpperCase(), o=oSel.value.toUpperCase();",
    " let n=0, sumDist=0, sumDur=0, sumCO2=0, sumKWh=0, sumChg=0;",
    " rows.forEach(r=>{",
    "   const keepS=(s==='ALL'||r.dataset.scenario===s);",
    "   const keepP=(p==='ALL'||r.dataset.power===p);",
    "   const keepO=(o==='ALL'||r.dataset.origin===o);",
    "   const vis=keepS&&keepP&&keepO;",
    "   r.style.display=vis?'':'none';",
    "   if(vis){n++;const c=r.cells;sumDist+=parseFloat(c[5].textContent)||0;sumDur+=parseFloat(c[6].textContent)||0;sumCO2+=parseFloat(c[11].textContent)||0;sumKWh+=parseFloat(c[9].textContent)||0;sumChg+=parseFloat(c[10].textContent)||0;}",
    " });",
    " if(n>0){",
    "  summaryDiv.innerHTML='<b>Showing '+n+' runs</b> &mdash; Avg Distance: '+(sumDist/n).toFixed(1)+' mi | Avg Duration: '+(sumDur/n).toFixed(2)+' h | Avg CO2: '+(sumCO2/n).toFixed(1)+' kg | Avg BEV kWh: '+(sumKWh/n).toFixed(1)+' | Avg Charge Stops: '+(sumChg/n).toFixed(1);",
    " } else { summaryDiv.innerHTML='<b>No matching runs</b>'; }",
    "}",
    "sSel.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);",
    "pSel.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);",
    "oSel.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);",
    "applyFilters();",
    "document.getElementById('csv-download-btn').addEventListener('click',function(){",
    " const vis=rows.filter(r=>r.style.display!=='none');",
    " let csv=hdr.join(',')+String.fromCharCode(10);",
    " vis.forEach(r=>{csv+=[...r.cells].map(c=>c.textContent).join(',')+String.fromCharCode(10);});",
    " const blob=new Blob([csv],{type:'text/csv'});",
    " const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);",
    " a.download='scenario_explorer_filtered.csv';a.click();",
    "});",
    "</script>",
    sep = ""
  )
} else {
  summary_path <- pick_path(c(
    "../../data/derived/scenario_summary.csv",
    "../data/derived/scenario_summary.csv",
    "data/derived/scenario_summary.csv"
  ))

  if (!nzchar(summary_path)) {
    summary_path <- pick_path(c(
      "../../outputs/aggregate/results_summary.csv",
      "../outputs/aggregate/results_summary.csv",
      "outputs/aggregate/results_summary.csv"
    ))
  }

  if (!nzchar(summary_path)) {
    cat("<p><em>No explorer data found. Generate either FU transport rows or aggregate scenario summaries.</em></p>")
    knitr::knit_exit()
  }

  df <- utils::read.csv(summary_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!("scenario_id" %in% names(df))) df$scenario_id <- "AGGREGATE"
  if (!("powertrain" %in% names(df))) df$powertrain <- "unknown"
  if (!("metric" %in% names(df))) df$metric <- "unknown"
  if (!("mean" %in% names(df))) df$mean <- NA_real_

  cat("<p><strong>Fallback data source:</strong> <code>", summary_path, "</code></p>", sep = "")
  knitr::kable(utils::head(df, 100))
}
```
